results.title: What Lindsey Graham Wanted
results.description: Mark Leibovich: “Senator Lindsey Graham, who died unexpectedly last night, was a pivotal citizen of the Washington conversation. He loved being in the mix, slapping bipartisan backs off camera, and then, when the lights came on, cracking wise, weighing in, and, yes, currying favor with a certain Audience of One.” “What could be more fitting, [...]

results.title: Investigation underway after man shot in North Braddock, Allegheny County
results.description: One person was taken to the hospital after being shot in North Braddock Sunday evening.

results.title: Port Washington residential fire displaces two occupants on early Sunday morning
results.description: The Port Washington Fire Department was dispatched on early Sunday morning to a single-story residential structure fire.

results.title: Sen. Mitch McConnell releases health update after hospitalization
results.description: A long-awaited response from Sen. Mitch McConnell has been released about his recent health scare.

results.title: Crews put out heavy flames at Rock Island house fire
results.description: Firefighters responded to a residential fire in Rock Island on Saturday. The sole occupant escaped safely, and the cause remains under investigation.

results.title: Kayla Osborne earns her third Evansville Women's City Tournament victory
results.description: Kayla Osborne held off a late charge from the defending champion to earn her third Evansville Women's City golf title.

results.title: Netanyahu says Trump wants to 'exhaust possibility' of diplomacy on Iran nuclear issue
results.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has said that US President Donald Trump wanted to "exhaust the possibility" of reaching a diplomatic agreement with Iran before pursuing other options on the nuclear issue.

results.title: Siblings run lemonade stand to honor sister, raise money for cancer research
results.description: Oliver and his sister Ellie have set out a goal this year to raise $2,000 for cancer research after losing their sister to Leukemia in 2023.

results.description: Lake Mead Blvd at MLK Jr. Blvd remains closed through the weekend with new restrictions starting Monday

results.title: Possible drowning in southeast Calgary being investigated by fire department
results.description: The Calgary Fire Department is investigating a possible drowning Sunday afternoon in southeast Calgary.

results.title: Joliet police seek information after 18-year-old man is shot Saturday
results.description: An 18-year-old man was shot on Saturday evening and Joliet police are asking the public for information about the incident.

results.title: Claude Code’s Token Tax: Why One AI Coding Tool Burns 4.7 Times More Before You Even Start
results.description: Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading your prompt. OpenCode uses 7k. New measurements show how baselines, subagents, and MCP servers drive real costs in agentic coding. The lighter tool doesn't always win the session. Teams must weigh flexibility against speed and autonomy.

results.title: Lindsey Graham’s death deprives Ukraine of key Trump whisperer
results.description: Graham's death comes as Ukraine is urging allies to provide more Patriot missiles to defend against increasingly deadly Russian ballistic strikes.

results.title: Rockyview Silvertips play Calgary Shamrocks in lacrosse playoffs
results.description: The Junior B Tier 1 teams played on Saturday evening, July 11, at Genesis Place.
